name: Twin Stripe Cotton Hand Towel Beige/Rust - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Lightweight, Farmhouse, OEKO-TEX Certified
description:
Meet your everyday needs in simple style with the Twin Stripe Cotton Hand Towel from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This beige hand towel features twin stripes in orange hues for a contrasting look that complements your existing decor and is adorned with fringe to elevate the look. Made with 100% cotton fabric, this lightweight hand towel feels soft and is great for wiping hands or performing cleaning tasks.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
